MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID.desc: Valid monitor link group configuration with uplinks and downlinks arrays

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_MINIMAL.desc: Minimal valid monitor link group configuration with defaults

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_COMPREHENSIVE.desc: Comprehensive monitor link group configuration with all fields

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_GROUP_NAME_PA.desc: Invalid group name with special characters (@, !, spaces)

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_GROUP_NAME_LE.desc: Group name exceeding maximum length of 128 characters

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_GROUP_NAME_EM.desc: Empty group name violating minimum length of 1

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_UPLINKS_PATTE.desc: Invalid uplink interface pattern (not Ethernet or PortChannel)

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_UPLINKS_ETHER.desc: Invalid Ethernet interface number (out of range)

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_DOWNLINKS_PAT.desc: Invalid downlink interface pattern (not Ethernet or PortChannel)

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_DOWNLINKS_ETH.desc: Invalid Ethernet interface number (out of range)

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_DESCRIPTION_L.desc: Description exceeding maximum length of 255 characters
Empty description violating minimum length of 1

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID_ETHERNET_RANGES.desc: Valid configuration testing various Ethernet interface ranges

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID_PORTCHANNEL_RAN.desc: Valid configuration testing various PortChannel interface ranges

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID_MIXED_INTERFACE.desc: Valid configuration with mixed Ethernet and PortChannel interfaces

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID_NUMERIC_EDGE_CA.desc: Valid configuration testing numeric field edge cases (0, large numbers)

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID_DESCRIPTION_EDG.desc: Valid configuration testing description length edge cases

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_MIN_UPLINKS_H.desc: min-uplinks 999999999999999999 (pathological value from bug report) is rejected as outside uint32 bounds

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_INVALID_STARTUP_DELAY.desc: startup-delay 6001 exceeds maximum cap of 6000 seconds
startup-delay 99999999999999999 (pathological value from bug report) is rejected as outside uint32 bounds

MONITOR_LINK_GROUP_VALID_AT_CAP_BOUNDARY.desc: Valid configuration at the maximum boundary (min-uplinks=512, startup-delay=6000)
